name: Freezer Mix One-Dish Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip the container of frozen mix into hot water just to loosen.
2. In a Dutch oven, heat the frozen mix and remaining ingredients except cheese to boiling.
3. Reduce heat and cover; simmer, stirring frequently until the mix is thawed and spaghetti is tender, about 30 minutes. Add a small amount of water if necessary.
4. Sprinkle with cheese; cover and heat until cheese is melted.
